title: Emails showing up in some boards but not all?
excerpt: We set up our emails using the email and activities a few months ago. For some reason, some of the boards nothing is showing up since May/June. Other boards are up to date. I cannot figure out why it’s happening.

posts.author: Southernbks (Tori Breen)
posts.cookedHtml: We set up our emails using the email and activities a few months ago. For some reason, some of the boards nothing is showing up since May/June. Other boards are up to date. I cannot figure out why it’s happening.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Southernbks ,
There are some possible reasons why some of your boards are not showing emails since May/June:it can be because the email and activities integration may not be enabled for those boards or the email column may not be set up correctly or the email filter may be blocking emails from showing up or there may be a problem with your email settings.

posts.author: Southernbks (Tori Breen)
posts.cookedHtml: From what I can tell it is implemented but I could be missing something… I may need help.
